feedback.text: I enjoy gaming quite a bit; several of my favorite games could get dropped by their devs, and I would lose the ability to play them, even though they are a service I have paid for. For example, Helldivers (1&2), Foxhole, and Hell Let Loose. Even though I am not an EU citizen, I have seen the EU pressure industries globally for the better. I hope that that is what will happen here as well.
